curated_source.description: Repo-relative path to the curated resume markdown that this variant copied. Present only when provenance='curated'.

lane_id.description: Cover-letter lane id (one of platform_internal_tools, ai_engineer, product_minded_engineer). Mirrors variant_style for cover letters. Optional; absent for pre-lane artifacts.

lane_source.description: Whether the lane was auto-selected from signal scoring or passed explicitly via --lane.

lane_rationale.description: Short human-readable explanation of why this lane was chosen.

selected_question_bank_questions.description: Question-bank prompts whose answers contributed to the generated letter.

company_facts_used.description: Grounded company facts actually used in the rendered prose. Empty list means research was present but unusable; absent field means no research was supplied.

generation_warnings.description: Soft warnings recorded by the generator (lane_low_confidence, weak_lane_evidence, stale_name_filtered).
